headline: Lindian strengthens board and project team as Kangankunde build gathers pace
summary: Lindian Resources Ltd (ASX:LIN, OTC:LINIF) has reshaped its board and management team as it pushes towards first production at its flagship Kangankunde Rare Earths Project in Malawi and advances downstream processing plans in Kazakhstan. The appointments are aimed at reinforcing execution...

headline: Small Cap Watch: Lindian, Critical Resources, Resokution Minerals and more...
summary: S&P/ASX Small Ordinaries (ASX: XSO) closed at 3,378.30, up 133.20 points or 4.10% yesterday and 11.20 points or 0.33% over the past 5 days. Several small-cap companies have reported notable operational and corporate developments this morning. You can read about the following and more...
